overview: The Asia Africa Development Council website is a professional international non-profit platform promoting sustainable development, peace, and innovation in alignment with the UN Sustainable Development Agenda 2030, African Union Agenda 2063, India Growth Index, and Vision India 2047.
features: Multi-page organization website with Home, About, Services, Programs, News & Events, and Contact pages
Contact and partnership inquiry system with multiple inquiry types
Professional design with forest-green and gold color palette
Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Backend data storage for events and inquiry submissions
